name: Spicy Pork Strips
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Minced green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice pork into 1/4-inch thick strips, about 4 inches long.
2. Thread onto metal or bamboo skewers, keeping meat as flat as possible. Arrange skewers in a large shallow pan.
3. In a bowl, blend soy sauce, green onions, sugar, sesame seeds, water, ginger, Tabasco sauce, and garlic, stirring until sugar dissolves.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over skewers; turn to coat all sides. Let stand 30 minutes, turning skewers occasionally.
5. Reserve marinade. Remove skewers and place on a rack of broiler pan; brush with reserved marinade.
6. Broil 3 minutes, or until pork is tender, turning once and basting with additional marinade.
Serves: 6
